title: NammaShanti Incident Report Contract
description: The exact JSON structure outputted by the Gemini AI Engine after analyzing an incoming message.

original_text.description: The raw message text received from the citizen (Kannada, Hindi, English, etc.).

translated_text.description: The message translated into standard English.

pin_code.description: The 6-digit PIN code extracted from the text, if any.

area_name.description: The specific area or landmark mentioned (e.g., 'Electronic City', 'Majestic').

lat.description: Approximate latitude of the location in Bengaluru.

lng.description: Approximate longitude of the location in Bengaluru.

threat_score.description: Legacy threat score, now represents the Gemini Semantic Score.

panic_index.description: The definitive Panic Index combining Static Score, Velocity Score, and Semantic Score.

velocity_score.description: Score based on frequency of similar messages in the last 15 minutes.

static_score.description: Score based on the number of hyper-local trigger words.

triggers.description: Keywords or specific triggers identified (e.g., 'riot', 'water mafia', 'migrant clashes', 'mob').

is_actionable.description: True if the message contains enough specific information (location + threat) to warrant intervention.

draft_response.description: A Gemini-drafted 'Myth vs. Fact' clarification in English, ready to be translated and broadcast via TTS.
